mapper.select: select cp.id, cp.create_time, cp.product_name, cp.product_code, cp.product_pics, cp.min_price, cp.if_shipped, cp.logistic_id, cp.shelve_area,cp.shelve_state, cp.shelve_area, cp.brand_name, cp.product_classify, cp.product_specs, cp.labels, cp.merchant_id, cmi.merchant_name, cp.product_text from cm_product cp left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cp.merchant_id = cmi.id where cp.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update cm_product set deleted = '1' where id in
#{id}
update cm_product set product_skus = #{productSkus} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select distinct cp.id as productId,cp.product_name as productName, sum(cop.amount) over(partition by cp.id) as volume from cm_product cp left join cm_product_sku cps on cp.id = cps.product_id left join cm_order_products cop on cop.sku_id = cps.id left join cm_order_shopping cos on cos.id = cop.order_id where cos.payment_state = 3 and cp.merchant_id = #{merchantId} and cop.create_time > #{start} order by volume desc
limit #{limitNum}
